grades.expectation: Response covers multiple CQS practice areas (governance, client care, training, file management, cyber security)
grades.reason: Clearly covers all areas with dedicated sections for governance, client care, training, file management, and cyber security

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific evidence types needed (e.g. training records, complaints log, SRO details)
grades.reason: Provides extensive specific evidence lists including training records, complaints register, SRO contact details, AML policies, etc.

grades.expectation: Response references the Senior Responsible Officer (SRO) requirement
grades.reason: Explicitly mentions 'designated CQS Senior Responsible Officer' and includes SRO responsibilities in evidence requirements

grades.expectation: Response mentions protocol compliance monitoring as a CQS requirement
grades.reason: Specifically states 'Written procedures exist for monitoring protocol compliance' and 'Documented procedures for protocol compliance monitoring'

grades.expectation: Response covers cyber security / IT security requirements
grades.reason: Dedicated 'Information Security' section covering cyber security awareness, IT security policy, and fraud prevention measures

grades.expectation: Response mentions file management and supervision requirements
grades.reason: Includes 'File & Case Management' section with file audit records, undertakings register, and monitoring systems
